chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3572 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing on CMA No.14896/2021 2. For hearing of main case 24.02.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Immad Qamar, advocate for respondent Qazi Abdul Haleem Siddiqui, Deputy Attorney General The matter pertains to suspension of sales tax registration, which according to learned counsel for the petitioner has been unjustifiably suspended. The respective learned counsel jointly propose that the petitioner shall avail the remedy per section 21 Sales Tax Act, 1990, within the period of 15 days; the respondent department would decide the representation expeditiously vide a speaking order and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner; pending such consideration, no further coercive action would be taken against the petitioner; any findings shall be subject to remedy before the appropriate forum and law it is jointly submitted that this petition be disposed of as aforesaid. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
